methodology: Derived from customer KPI pyramids, 1-year product strategy horizons, and delivery activity using an OKR-inspired objective structure.

objectives.title: 2024-Q1 Global Frequent Flyer Member outcome goal
objectives.objective: Improve Premium booking conversion rate for Global Frequent Flyer Member by advancing direct premium conversion and self-service servicing quality through identity-linked retailing and trip confidence.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Composite measure of how confidently premium guests can shop, prepare, travel, and recover when plans change.
Share of premium-intent shopping sessions that turn into confirmed bookings.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Expected contribution from a premium guest across repeat flights, ancillaries, loyalty, and partner spend.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Trip confidence index during the quarter.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Premium booking conversion rate during the quarter.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Premium guest lifetime value during the quarter.

objectives.title: 2024-Q2 Family Holiday Planner outcome goal
objectives.objective: Improve Holiday quote-to-book conversion for Family Holiday Planner by advancing holiday package conversion and pre-travel servicing quality through unified flights and holidays retailing.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Composite measure of how clearly and safely families can book, manage, and prepare for a holiday.
Share of holiday package quotes that convert to confirmed bookings.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Expected contribution from a leisure household across repeat holiday and related travel purchases.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Holiday booking confidence score during the quarter.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Holiday quote-to-book conversion during the quarter.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Holiday lifetime value per household during the quarter.

objectives.title: 2024-Q3 Corporate Travel Program Manager outcome goal
objectives.objective: Improve In-policy booking rate for Corporate Travel Program Manager by advancing content control and disruption credibility in managed travel through corporate distribution and recovery excellence.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Overall confidence of a managed-travel customer in the airline's content, servicing, and reliability.
Share of corporate bookings made within program policy and preferred content paths.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Portion of a managed account's addressable long-haul demand captured by the airline and its controlled channels.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Corporate account satisfaction during the quarter.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase In-policy booking rate during the quarter.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Corporate revenue share of wallet during the quarter.

objectives.title: 2024-Q4 Air Freight Forwarding Manager outcome goal
objectives.objective: Improve Digital cargo booking share for Air Freight Forwarding Manager by advancing digital cargo booking adoption and exception transparency through cargo self-service foundation.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Composite measure of how confidently a freight customer can book, track, and recover a shipment.
Share of cargo bookings made through digital channels rather than manual channels.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Revenue yield captured from available cargo capacity on the network.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Cargo flow confidence index during the quarter.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Digital cargo booking share during the quarter.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Cargo yield per available tonne during the quarter.

objectives.title: 2025-Q1 Network Operations Control Director outcome goal
objectives.objective: Improve Completion factor for Network Operations Control Director by advancing operational stability and guest-aware disruption recovery through integrated operations and guest recovery control.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Share of planned flights operated to completion.
Time needed to move from disruption detection to an agreed recovery action.

linkedBusinessKPIs.kpiName: Irregular operations cost per disrupted flight
linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Direct operational and guest-handling cost incurred for each materially disrupted flight.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Completion factor during the quarter.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Decrease Recovery decision cycle time during the quarter.

keyResults.metric: Irregular operations cost per disrupted flight
keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Decrease Irregular operations cost per disrupted flight during the quarter.

description: Archived quarterly objectives covering the past two years before the current quarter.
